verses.text: <ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bú</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>计<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>谋<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">móu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">亵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiè</rt></ruby><ruby>慢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">màn</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>座<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>位<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wei</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>惟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>律<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǜ</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fǎ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>昼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhòu</rt></ruby><ruby>夜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yè</rt></ruby><ruby>思<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>想<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiǎnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>便<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>福<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>棵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kē</rt></ruby><ruby>树<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shù</rt></ruby><ruby>栽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zāi</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>溪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>旁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hou</rt></ruby><ruby>结<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>果<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yè</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>枯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kū</rt></ruby><ruby>干<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡān</rt></ruby>。<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>尽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>顺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shùn</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">È</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>糠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">秕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>风<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chuī</rt></ruby><ruby>散<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sàn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>审<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shěn</rt></ruby><ruby>判<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby>；<ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">què</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>灭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miè</rt></ruby><ruby>亡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wài</rt></ruby><ruby>邦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>闹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nào</rt></ruby>？<ruby>万<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wàn</rt></ruby><ruby>民<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mín</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>谋<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">móu</rt></ruby><ruby>算<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suàn</rt></ruby><ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>妄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>君<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jūn</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>齐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qí</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>臣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chén</rt></ruby><ruby>宰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>商<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>议<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>敌<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dí</rt></ruby><ruby>挡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>膏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhě</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>挣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>捆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǔn</rt></ruby><ruby>绑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>脱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tuō</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>绳<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>索<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>笑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiào</rt></ruby>；<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">嗤<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>笑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiào</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>怒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nù</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>责<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zé</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>烈<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>怒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nù</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>惊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>经<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jinɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>君<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jūn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>锡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>膏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhě</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>旨<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǐ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>今<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jīn</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>赐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>业<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>极<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>赐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>田<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tián</rt></ruby><ruby>产<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chǎn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>铁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiě</rt></ruby><ruby>杖<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>打<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>破<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pò</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>窑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yáo</rt></ruby><ruby>匠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>瓦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>器<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qì</rt></ruby><ruby>摔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuāi</rt></ruby><ruby>碎<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suì</rt></ruby>。’”

<ruby>现<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>君<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jūn</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>应<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>省<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>悟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>审<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shěn</rt></ruby><ruby>判<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pàn</rt></ruby><ruby>官<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuān</rt></ruby><ruby>该<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāi</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>管<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby>。

因Yīn为wèi耶Yē和hé华huá神Shén是shì日rì头tou，是shì盾dùn牌pái，要yào赐cì下xià恩ēn惠huì和hé荣rónɡ耀yào。他Tā未wèi尝chánɡ留liú下xià一yí样yànɡ好hǎo处chù不bù给ɡěi那nà些xiē行xínɡ动dònɡ正zhènɡ直zhí的de人rén。12 万Wàn军jūn之zhī耶Yē和hé华huá啊ɑ，倚yǐ靠kào你nǐ的de人rén便biàn为wéi有yǒu福fú！
